name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: finish strong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Friend,

In a few short hours we will come up against our November deadline. With your help, we can finish strong and keep our latest momentum going.

We have set up a personalized link for you to give to the campaign before tonight's midnight deadline. **[If you are able to give, please use this link.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c58/70cdc2ba/47bec071/396759e/518818873/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvhnov-15-eom?refcode=em11302015_2&amount=25&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+If+you+are+able+to+give+please+use+this+&utm_campaign=em11302015_2&source=em11302015_2")**

Thank you so much,

Chris

---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c58/70cdc2ba/47bec071/396759f/518818873/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em11302015_2&source=em11302015_2") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Official Clinton Campaign
subject: Deadline extended: Last-chance for the NEW limited-edition magnet!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
A few more hours to get your magnet! | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjQxMjQ1NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwMDE4NTg2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
---
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjQxMjQ1NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwMDE4NTg2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

[**Chip in to get your magnet before we run out!**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjQxMjQ1NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwMDE4NTg2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjQxMjQ1NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwMDE4NTg2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQxMjQ1NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwMDE4NTg2S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjQxMjQ1NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwMDE4NTg2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjQxMjQ1NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwMDE4NTg2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQxMjQ1NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwMDE4NTg2S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjQxMjQ1NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwMDE4NTg2S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjQxMjQ1NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwMDE4NTg2S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjQxMjQ1NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwMDE4NTg2S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjQxMjQ1NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwMDE4NTg2S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjQxMjQ1NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwMDE4NTg2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

body:

\- This Wednesday -
Join Us in Manassas on Wednesday!

| Dear Peter Willis, Join us on Wednesday, December 2nd in Manassas, VA for a Donald J. Trump for President Rally. The event begins at 7:30 p.m., doors open at 5:00 p.m. Please arrive well ahead of start time and limit personal items for expedited entry. Tickets are available at [TrumpManassas.Eventbrite.com](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zuilrjy-drdiuiutjh-j/). The event will be held at the Prince William County Fairground - 10624 Dumfries Road Manassas, VA 20112. Team Trump looks forward to another successful event in Virginia! We hope to see you there!

name: ted@tedcruz.org
subject: This must be wrong
body:
CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT

Friend -- I just got the report from my campaign manager and
your name isn't on it. This must be a mistake.

Friend -- I just got the report from my campaign manager and
your name isn't on it.

This must be a mistake.

I know times are tough, and I understand if you can't donate
today...

But before I close the campaign books for Nov., I wanted to give
you one last chance.

Chip in »

Heidi and I thank you!

For liberty,
-Ted

P.S. If you did chip in and our emails crossed in cyberspace,
thank you very much.

PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR
PRESIDENTwww.tedcruz.org

name: Rand Paul
subject: They're wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

In case you haven't seen it, yesterday I
wrote a piece in TIME describing the very real issues with
electing leaders who do not understand the consequences of their
reckless foreign policies.

Hillary Clinton, Marco Rubio and several
other of today's neoconservatives are pursuing the idea that
American intervention is the best option. They advocated for
regime change in Libya, in Syria, and now they've got big ideas
for Russia.

They want to re-enact the Cold War.

An expensive, all out, potentially endless
war that will cost America more than we can handle. Will you
stand with me today by donating $50 to help me fight the
neoconservative ideology?

The foolish policies of my opponents are
exactly the type proposed by radicals in the 50s. We avoided
nuclear war then because we had a leader capable of shutting down
the neoconservative ideologues. Eisenhower avoided war with
Russia by being the adult in the room. That's what we need now.

Today, we have an aggressive new potentate in
Russia but fortunately not the hair trigger atmosphere of the
early Cold War. Nevertheless, it remains important that the free
world be led by a leader capable of reining in the
neoconservatives by not giving them free reign to their endless
ambitions to remake the world in America's image.

As we select a new Commander in Chief, I hope
voters will seek out a leader who will not pursue a reckless
policy that traps us under a mountain of debt and beguiles us
into perpetual war.

I hope I can count on you to stand with me
today.

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

Give $10 Today >>

Give $25 Today >>

Give $50 Today >>

Give $100 Today >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWYJ3_EyNA

They advocated for regime change in Libya, in Syria, and now they've got big ideas for Russia. They want to re-enact the Cold War. name: Kevin Bingle, Digital Director
subject: See this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)

Peter, I wanted to make sure that you saw Beth's email. Would love to have you there.

The contest ends Wednesday at midnight!

[Enter for a chance to win a trip for you and a guest to the GOP Debate in Las Vegas!](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31986997:W1yTxEyHN:m:1:958431888:8473CA181C85947B26254752A0F7D714:r)

Thanks.

-Kevin

Sent from Kevin's iPhone

\--
From: Beth Hansen - Campaign Manager
Date: November 24, 2015
Subject: Win a trip - Las Vegas GOP Debate
To: Peter

How'd you like to take a trip to Las Vegas on Tuesday, Dec. 15th to attend the next GOP Presidential debate?

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31986997:W1yTxEyHN:m:1:958431888:8473CA181C85947B26254752A0F7D714:r)

**[Make a $10 or more contribution before 11:59PM (EST) on Wednesday 12/2/15](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31986998:W1yTxEyHN:m:1:958431888:8473CA181C85947B26254752A0F7D714:r)**[and you'll automatically be entered for a chance to win!](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31986999:W1yTxEyHN:m:1:958431888:8473CA181C85947B26254752A0F7D714:r)

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31986998:W1yTxEyHN:m:1:958431888:8473CA181C85947B26254752A0F7D714:r)
**
This offer includes:**
• Tickets for you and 1 guest to attend the debate
• Roundtrip airfare to Las Vegas
• One-night stay at a hotel near the debate location

**[Make a $10 or more contribution to support John Kasich RIGHT NOW](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31986998:W1yTxEyHN:m:1:958431888:8473CA181C85947B26254752A0F7D714:r)**[ and you'll automatically be entered for a chance to win!](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31986999:W1yTxEyHN:m:1:958431888:8473CA181C85947B26254752A0F7D714:r)

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31986998:W1yTxEyHN:m:1:958431888:8473CA181C85947B26254752A0F7D714:r)

The winner of this contest will be notified on Thursday, December 3rd.

Thanks for your support and good luck!

**Beth Hansen
**Campaign Manager
[JohnKasich.com](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31986998:W1yTxEyHN:m:1:958431888:8473CA181C85947B26254752A0F7D714:r)

Kasich For America Contest Rules
-Contest ends December 2, 2015 at 11:59pm EST.
-Limit one entry per individual.
-A donation of $10 or more will automatically enter you in the contest.
-You can enter without making a contribution [by clicking here](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31987000:W1yTxEyHN:m:1:958431888:8473CA181C85947B26254752A0F7D714:r).
-Entering this Promotion by making a contribution does not increase your chances or odds of winning.
-Void where prohibited.

See full terms & conditions [[here](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31987001:W1yTxEyHN:m:1:958431888:8473CA181C85947B26254752A0F7D714:r).]

NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN THIS PROMOTION. No contribution of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances or odds of winning. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. Only individuals who are legally permitted to make contributions to Kasich For America may enter by making a contribution. Void where prohibited. This Promotion begins on Monday, November 23, 2015 at 7:00 a.m. Eastern Standard Time and ends on Tuesday, December 2, 2015 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time ("Entry Period"). All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time on Tuesday, December 2, 2015. The winner of this Promotion will be notified on or before December 3, 2015\. One winner will receive the following Prize: two tickets to the Republican Presidential Primary Debate in Las Vegas, Nevada on December 15, 2015; round-trip, coach tickets to Las Vegas, Nevada for the winner and one guest, with an approximate retail value of $600; and hotel accommodations for the winner and a guest, with an approximate retail value of $250. Prize may not be substituted or exchanged and is not redeemable for cash. All federal, state, and local taxes associated with the receipt or use of any prize awarded are the sole responsibility of the winner. The Sponsor of this Promotion is Kasich For America, Post Office Box 1344, Columbus, Ohio 43216.

name: Jeff Weaver, Bernie 2016
subject: YES or NO?
